name: SenesTech, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We have developed and are commercializing products for managing animal pest populations through fertility control and population management strategies. Our current products focus on rat and mouse populations, and are known as: ContraPest, Evolve Rat, and Evolve Mouse. As far back as we can trace, rodents have been foes to mankind.
